opinion.h2: Charles H. SYLVAIN, petitioner, v. Priscilla S. HENDERSON, Executrix, Estate of Eudore J. Sylvain No. 82-280
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The motion of petitioner for leave to add party as respondent is denied. Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of New Hampshire denied.[ Sylvain v. Henderson 459 U.S. 1004 (1982) ]
